footer.title: Quran
footer.description: A non-profit digital platform aiming to facilitate access to the Holy Quran, listen to it, search it, and understand its language.

home.title: Read, Listen, Search, and Reflect on the Quran

about.title: About Quran
about.description1: Quran is a non-profit digital platform aiming to facilitate access to the Holy Quran, help users read it, listen to it, and explore its language in a simple and modern way.
about.description2: We gather in one place tools needed by the reader and researcher, such as reading in Uthmani script, audio recitations, search, translations, linguistic roots, and lexicons, with a design that focuses on ease of use and reduces complexity.

mvp.title: First Public Release (MVP)
mvp.desc1: This is the first public release of Quran, focused on delivering the core reading and language exploration experience.
mvp.desc2: Future releases will expand the platform with additional study tools, learning features, and mobile applications.

key-features.title: What does Quran offer?
features: Reading the Holy Quran in Uthmani script.
Audio recitations with follow-along highlight of verses and words during reading.
Quick search in surahs, verses, and words.
Multiple translations of the Holy Quran.
Exploring linguistic roots and word meanings from original sources.
A free, non-profit platform available to everyone.

non-profit.title: Non-profit Project
non-profit.desc1: Quran is an independent, non-profit project developed to provide a free cognitive service that anyone can benefit from, without ads, subscriptions, or commercial goals.
non-profit.desc2: We seek to build an open project that welcomes community contributions in the future, whether in development, translation, content improvement, or data review.

linguistic-sources.title: Linguistic Sources
linguistic-sources.desc: The language section of Quran relies on authentic lexical sources, most notably Lane's Lexicon and Maqayis al-Lughah. A custom processing pipeline has been developed for the project to extract, organize, and enrich these sources to suit the user experience on the platform.

credits.title: Acknowledgements
credits.desc: We extend our sincere thanks to all projects and institutions that contributed to providing the open data and sources upon which this project relies, most notably:

list.name: Quran Foundation
list.desc: APIs for Quranic text, recitations, search, and translations.

list.name: King Fahd Glorious Quran Printing Complex
Quranic Arabic Corpus
list.desc: Linguistic data, roots, and morphological analysis.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.desc: We respect the privacy of our users and are committed to collecting the minimum amount of data necessary to run and improve the Quran platform. This page explains what information is collected and how it is used.

info-collection.title: Information We Collect
info-collection.desc1: Using Quran does not require creating an account or logging in.
info-collection.desc2: Some technical information may be collected automatically when visiting the website, such as:
items: Time and date of the visit.
Technical data that helps improve site performance and stability.
info-collection.desc3: We do not use this information to identify the user.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.desc1: The website may use cookies or similar technologies to improve the user experience, such as:
cookies.desc2: Cookies are not used for advertising purposes or tracking users across other websites.

external-services.title: External Services
external-services.desc1: The project relies on some external services and sources to provide parts of the content, such as APIs from the Quran Foundation to obtain Quranic text, recitations, search, and translations.
external-services.desc2: These services may be subject to their own privacy policies.

ads.title: Advertisements
ads.desc: Quran does not display any advertisements.

data-sharing.title: Data Sharing
data-sharing.desc: We do not sell, rent, or share user data with any entity for commercial purposes.

data-protection.title: Data Protection
data-protection.desc: We strive to apply appropriate security practices to protect the website and the data processed, keeping in mind that no method of transmission or storage over the Internet guarantees absolute security.

policy-changes.title: Changes to This Policy
policy-changes.desc1: The privacy policy may be updated when adding new features or changing how the website operates.
policy-changes.desc2: Any update will be published on this page.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: If you have any questions or feedback about the privacy policy, you can contact us through our Contact Us page or via the official social media channels of the project.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.desc2: By using this platform, you agree to the terms of use outlined on this page.

use.title: Using the Platform
use.desc: Quran can be used for free for personal, educational, and research purposes, in compliance with applicable laws and regulations.

content-nature.title: Nature of Content
content-nature.desc1: The platform aims to facilitate access to the Holy Quran, listen to it, and explore its language through modern digital tools.
content-nature.desc2: It is not intended to provide religious rulings (fatwas) or replace specialized scientific sources.

accuracy.title: Accuracy of Information
accuracy.desc1: We strive to provide accurate information as much as possible; however, unintended errors may occur or some data may need updating.
accuracy.desc2: We welcome reporting any notes or errors to help improve the platform.

intellectual-property.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual-property.desc1: The project relies on a number of open sources and projects referred to on the About Us page.
intellectual-property.desc2: The rights to those data, fonts, and content belong to their respective owners in accordance with their original licenses.
intellectual-property.desc3: As for the software and content developed specifically for the Quran project, the rights belong to the project, unless stated otherwise.

acceptable-use.title: Acceptable Use
acceptable-use.desc: It is prohibited to use the platform in a way that leads to:
items: Damaging the website or disrupting its services.
Abusing the site's interfaces or attempting unauthorized access.
Violating the rights of others or applicable laws.

external-services.title: External Services
external-services.desc: Some parts of the platform may rely on services or APIs provided by third parties, and these services may be subject to their own terms.

modifications.title: Modifications
modifications.desc1: These terms may be updated as the project evolves or new features are added.
modifications.desc2: Continued use of the platform after the updates are published constitutes acceptance of the updated version.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: If you have any questions about the terms of use, you can contact us through our Contact Us page.
